title: Pepsi Time ( Herotime Addon )
description: HeroTime addon that adds a pepsiman alien
body:
# **Pepsi Time: The Power of Soda**

This mod was created with the intention of adding pepsiman as an alien in HeroTime's omnitrix and right now it works as an addon that allows me to integrate any meme or out of place alien that can come to my mind.

### To this date the mod adds the nexts features:

-Pepsiman Alien: Can run fast, jump high, shoot pepsi and drink it to power himself up.
-Vegeta Alien: The prince of all saiyans straight to your omnitrix.

**More aliens will be added in the future, right now the only way to unlock him is by the random alien unlock code but that may or may not change.**

Feel free to join my [discord](https://discord.gg/X45csrrYrn)
